overall.description: A first-person exploration of an abandoned, overgrown grand building with dramatic god rays streaming through windows. The player moves through a sunlit atrium, past a metal gate with a seated figure, up a debris-filled staircase, and into an upper room. The footage exhibits high-fidelity game engine rendering with post-apocalyptic atmosphere.

events.description: camera moves from dark corridor into brightly lit room with dramatic god rays
camera turns slightly right to navigate around central plant structure

agents.ego_description: walking forward through a doorway into a sunlit atrium, observing the overgrown central plant and debris

old ceiling fan with multiple blades hanging from the high ceiling

dramatic beams of sunlight streaming through tall windows, creating volumetric light effects
dark wooden bench against the left wall, partially covered in debris

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dark corridor looking into a grand, sunlit atrium. As the camera moves forward, it passes through an ornate doorway into the room, revealing a large central plant surrounded by debris. Dramatic god rays stream through windows on the right, illuminating dust particles in the air. The space shows signs of long-term abandonment with overgrown vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark transitional corridor leading to gated area

events.description: camera moves from bright atrium into darker corridor with minimal lighting
approaching metal gate with seated figure visible in the background

agents.ego_description: walking through a darker corridor toward a metal gate, passing by a wooden desk on the left

notable_agents.action: seated figure in a chair behind the metal gate, appearing motionless like a mannequin or statue

entered.detail: rusted metal security gate blocking the corridor, with vertical bars and horizontal supports
old wooden desk with items on top, positioned against the left wall
small warm light source on the floor near the gate, possibly a candle or lantern

segments.scene_description: Moving from the bright atrium into a darker corridor, the camera approaches a metal security gate. A seated figure is visible behind the gate, illuminated by a small light source on the floor. The environment transitions from open and sunlit to narrow and shadowy, with pipes running along the walls and debris scattered on the marble floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: gated checkpoint leading to grand staircase

events.description: camera passes through the metal gate and turns toward the grand staircase
natural light becomes visible again from upper windows as camera approaches stairs

agents.ego_description: passing through the metal gate and turning right to face the grand staircase, beginning ascent

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with ornate metal railings, leading upward to an upper floor
large dead or dormant tree growing through the stairwell structure
heavy industrial pipes running horizontally along the walls, showing significant corrosion

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the metal gate into a space with a grand staircase. The environment shows industrial decay with rusted pipes and an overgrown tree visible in the stairwell. Natural light filters down from above, illuminating dust and debris as the camera begins to ascend the wide stone steps with ornate metal railings.

events.description: camera turns left at the stair landing to continue ascending the second flight
reaching the top of the stairs and entering the upper corridor

agents.ego_description: climbing the grand staircase, turning at the landing, and reaching the upper floor

entered.detail: upper floor balcony with metal railing overlooking the stairwell
framed portraits hanging on the wall along the staircase
large arched doorway at the top of the stairs leading to upper rooms

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the grand staircase, turning at a landing where wall paintings are visible. Overgrown vegetation clusters on the steps and railings. Reaching the top, the scene opens into an upper corridor with a doorway ahead. The lighting becomes brighter as the camera approaches the upper level, revealing more details of the decayed opulence.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned upper room with large windows and museum displays

events.description: entering the large upper room with broken windows and scattered debris
camera approaches a fallen sign revealing 'SAVOY' text amidst the rubble

agents.ego_description: moving through the upper room, examining the debris, display cases, and fallen signage near the windows

entered.detail: tall windows with metal grilles allowing diffused natural light to enter
dark wooden museum-style display cases with glass tops, some containing objects
large fallen wooden sign with 'SAVOY' lettering, lying at an angle among debris
white painted text on the wall reading 'KEEP OUT'

segments.scene_description: The final segment explores a large upper room with tall windows letting in diffused light. The space contains museum-like display cases and significant debris, including a prominent fallen sign reading 'SAVOY'. The camera moves past a 'KEEP OUT' graffiti tag toward the windows, revealing overgrown plants and the remnants of what appears to be a once-grand hotel or mansion.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dark corridor into a sunlit atrium, eventually ascending through industrial decay into a ruined upper gallery. It begins by passing through an ornate doorway into a grand, light-filled atrium where dramatic god rays illuminate a central plant and floating dust particles. As the camera leaves the brightness, the scene shifts into a narrow, shadowy corridor with exposed pipes, moving past a seated figure behind a metal security gate. The environment then opens up into a stairwell of rusted metal and overgrown trees, where the camera ascends wide stone steps and passes wall paintings before reaching an upper landing. Finally, the movement leads into a large, diffused-light room filled with museum-like display cases and a fallen Savoy sign, ending near tall windows and graffiti-covered walls.
